nasb.text: and a voice came out of the heavens: “You are My beloved Son, in You I am well-pleased.”

esv.text: And a voice came from heaven, “You are my beloved Son; with you I am well pleased.”

cnv.text: 又有聲音從天上來說：“你是我的愛子，我喜悅你。”

ccb.text: 从天上有声音说：“你是我的爱子，我甚喜悦你。”

csbs.text: 这时候，有声音从诸天传来，说： “你是我的爱子， 我喜悦你。”
